title: Payment gateway outage
description: All payment methods failing across checkout flows. Stripe and PayPal returning 503 errors. Error rate jumped from 0.1% to 18% in 4 minutes.

title: REST API p99 latency spike
description: API latency jumped from 120ms to 4.2s p99. No corresponding error rate increase. Suspect upstream dependency slowdown.

title: ETL pipeline stalled
description: Daily revenue ETL pipeline has not completed. Downstream finance dashboards are stale. No direct user impact but forecasting is blocked.
evidence: S3 write errors in worker logs

title: Suspicious IAM activity
description: Unusual ListUsers and CreateAccessKey calls originating from an unknown IP range. Potential credential compromise.

title: Customer support escalation — widespread notification delay
description: Email and push notifications delayed by 2 minutes globally. Reported via enterprise support channel. Issue is cosmetic but affects all active users.

title: GPU inference latency degradation on MI300X
description: Inference throughput dropped 40% on ROCm cluster. rocm-smi indicates thermal throttling. Triton kernels falling back to slower implementations.

title: LLM hallucination in production
description: Support chatbot generating incorrect refund policies and unauthorized discount codes. Answers appear confident but contradict internal policy docs.

title: Canary deployment rollback
description: New inference service version crashing on startup with OOM. Automatic rollback executed but canary still serving 2% traffic with elevated 5xx.

title: Primary DB connection limits reached
description: PostgreSQL max_connections exhausted during flash sale. Read replicas healthy but writes are queuing. Checkout flow degraded.

title: Checkout page blank for Safari users
description: React hydration error causing blank screen on Safari 17.4. Other browsers unaffected. Conversion rate down 12% on affected segment.

title: OAuth token validation failing
description: Third-party OAuth provider returning invalid signatures. JWT signature mismatch on previously valid tokens. Mobile app logins failing.

title: ROCm CI runner disk full
description: GitHub Actions ROCm runners failing due to /tmp exhaustion. Build artifacts accumulating after nightly model builds. Blocking ROCm-specific PRs.
evidence: Runner log: no space left on device
